text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fluffy
Date: Mon Jan 25 11:22:10 UTC 2021
New revision: 562561
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/562561

Log:
  graphics/[lib]gphoto2: update to 2.5.26

  LibCurl and LibXml2 now are mandatory to build driver for Lumix cameras

  Changelog:	http://www.gphoto.org/news/

  No ABI change, no need to bump consumers

  PR:		252959, 252960
  Submitted by:	fluffy
  Approved by:	maintainer (woodsb02)
  MFH:		2021Q1

Changes:
  head/graphics/gphoto2/Makefile
  head/graphics/gphoto2/distinfo
  head/graphics/libgphoto2/Makefile
  head/graphics/libgphoto2/distinfo
  head/graphics/libgphoto2/pkg-plist
